expansion_prompt: Break down the infrastructure setup into distinct components: 1. Kubernetes namespaces and operator deployments (CloudNative-PG, Redis operator). 2. PostgreSQL cluster deployment and initial database/user configuration. 3. Redis/Valkey cluster deployment. 4. S3/R2 bucket provisioning and credential generation. 5. Cloudflare Tunnel setup for initial Morgan agent access. 6. Creation and population of the 'sigma1-infra-endpoints' ConfigMap. 7. Comprehensive verification of all deployed components and connectivity. Parallel work streams can include S3/R2 provisioning and Cloudflare Tunnel setup once namespaces are ready. Critical dependencies are the successful deployment and configuration of each infrastructure piece before the ConfigMap can be finalized. Subagent types needed: Implementer (Kubernetes/Helm, Cloudflare, Terraform), Tester (connectivity, data access), Reviewer.
reasoning: This task involves provisioning and configuring multiple distinct, critical infrastructure components (PostgreSQL, Redis, S3/R2, Cloudflare Tunnel) and consolidating their access details into a ConfigMap, requiring deep knowledge of Kubernetes, Helm, and external cloud services. This is foundational architectural work with multiple integration points, justifying a score of 8.
